def solve(s : String) : Int64
    n = s.size
    prefix_L = Array.new(n + 1) { 0 }
    prefix_C = Array.new(n + 1) { 0 }
    suffix_T = Array.new(n + 1) { 0 }

    for i in 0..n-1
        prefix_L[i+1] = prefix_L[i] + (s[i] == 'L' ? 1 : 0)
        prefix_C[i+1] = prefix_C[i] + (s[i] == 'C' ? 1 : 0)
    end

    for i in (n-1)..0
        suffix_T[i] = suffix_T[i+1] + (s[i] == 'T' ? 1 : 0)
    end

    original = 0
    for j in 0..n-1
        if s[j] == 'C'
            original += prefix_L[j] * suffix_T[j+1]
        end
    end

    sum_C_T_after = Array.new(n + 1) { 0 }
    for i in (n-1)..0
        sum_C_T_after[i] = sum_C_T_after[i+1]
        if s[i] == 'C'
            sum_C_T_after[i] += suffix_T[i+1]
        end
    end

    sum_L_for_C_before = Array.new(n + 1) { 0 }
    for i in 0..n-1
        sum_L_for_C_before[i+1] = sum_L_for_C_before[i]
        if s[i] == 'C'
            sum_L_for_C_before[i+1] += prefix_L[i]
        end
    end

    max_gain = 0
    for i in 0..n
        max_gain = [max_gain, sum_C_T_after[i]].max
    end

    for i in 0..n
        gain = prefix_L[i] * suffix_T[i]
        max_gain = [max_gain, gain].max
    end

    for i in 0..n
        max_gain = [max_gain, sum_L_for_C_before[i]].max
    end

    return original + max_gain
end

def solve(s : String) : Int64
    n = s.length
    prefix_L = Array.new(n + 1, 0)
    prefix_C = Array.new(n + 1, 0)
    (0..n-1).each do |i|
        prefix_L[i+1] = prefix_L[i] + (s[i] == 'L' ? 1 : 0)
        prefix_C[i+1] = prefix_C[i] + (s[i] == 'C' ? 1 : 0)
    end

    suffix_T = Array.new(n + 1, 0)
    (n-1).downto(0).each do |i|
        suffix_T[i] = suffix_T[i+1] + (s[i] == 'T' ? 1 : 0)
    end

    original = 0
    (0..n-1).each do |j|
        if s[j] == 'C'
            original += prefix_L[j] * suffix_T[j+1]
        end
    end

    sum_C_T_after = Array.new(n + 1, 0)
    (n-1).downto(0).each do |i|
        sum_C_T_after[i] = sum_C_T_after[i+1]
        if s[i] == 'C'
            sum_C_T_after[i] += suffix_T[i+1]
        end
    end

    sum_L_for_C_before = Array.new(n + 1, 0)
    (0..n-1).each do |i|
        sum_L_for_C_before[i+1] = sum_L_for_C_before[i]
        if s[i] == 'C'
            sum_L_for_C_before[i+1] += prefix_L[i]
        end
    end

    max_gain = 0
    (0..n).each do |i|
        max_gain = max(max_gain, sum_C_T_after[i])
    end

    (0..n).each do |i|
        gain = (prefix_L[i] * suffix_T[i]).to_i64
        max_gain = max(max_gain, gain)
    end

    (0..n).each do |i|
        max_gain = max(max_gain, sum_L_for_C_before[i])
    end

    return original + max_gain
end

using namespace std;

long long solve(string s) {
    int n = s.length();
    vector<int> prefix_L(n + 1, 0);
    vector<int> prefix_C(n + 1, 0);
    vector<int> suffix_T(n + 1, 0);

    for (int i = 0; i < n; ++i) {
        prefix_L[i+1] = prefix_L[i] + (s[i] == 'L' ? 1 : 0);
        prefix_C[i+1] = prefix_C[i] + (s[i] == 'C' ? 1 : 0);
    }

    for (int i = n-1; i >= 0; --i) {
        suffix_T[i] = suffix_T[i+1] + (s[i] == 'T' ? 1 : 0);
    }

    long long original = 0;
    for (int j = 0; j < n; ++j) {
        if (s[j] == 'C') {
            original += (long long)prefix_L[j] * suffix_T[j+1];
        }
    }

    // Compute sum_C_T_after
    vector<int> sum_C_T_after(n + 1, 0);
    for (int i = n-1; i >= 0; --i) {
        sum_C_T_after[i] = sum_C_T_after[i+1];
        if (s[i] == 'C') {
            sum_C_T_after[i] += suffix_T[i+1];
        }

    // Compute sum_L_for_C_before
    vector<int> sum_L_for_C_before(n + 1, 0);
    for (int i = 0; i < n; ++i) {
        sum_L_for_C_before[i+1] = sum_L_for_C_before[i];
        if (s[i] == 'C') {
            sum_L_for_C_before[i+1] += prefix_L[i];
        }
    }

    long long max_gain = 0;

    // Check all possible insertions for 'L'
    for (int i = 0; i <= n; ++i) {
        max_gain = max(max_gain, (long long)sum_C_T_after[i]);

    // Check all possible insertions for 'C'
    for (int i = 0; i <= n; ++i) {
        long long gain = (long long)prefix_L[i] * suffix_T[i];
        max_gain = max(max_gain, gain);

    // Check all possible insertions for 'T'
    for (int i = 0; i <= n; ++i) {
        max_gain = max(max_gain, (long long)sum_L_for_C_before[i]);
    }

    return original + max_gain;
}
